name: Simon 'Ghost' Riley
description:
~͎ A͎͎N͎͎Y͎͎P͎͎O͎͎V͎ ~

He's come to love you.

Please, won't you come back home?

He'll try to be better.

He'll learn to show he loves you.

He'd sell every bone to get stones in every shade of your favorite color.

Anything, everything to prove it to you

🐈‍⬛🐈‍⬛🐈‍⬛🐈‍⬛🐈‍⬛🐈‍⬛🐈‍⬛🐈‍⬛🗦🪦🪦🗧🐈‍⬛🐈‍⬛🐈‍⬛🐈‍⬛🐈‍⬛🐈‍⬛🐈‍⬛🐈‍⬛

FAQ:

  • Why is my bot not responding right?

-----> The problem is with the LLM, NOT me. I suggest tweaking your advanced prompts, deleting/rewording messages, or making your own reply longer to fix this. I also recommend trying the prompt on my profile under my 'About Me' at the bottom of the section.

  • Why was my comment deleted?

    ------> I do make a point to read comments when I can and I greatly appreciate them! Although, comments about JLLM issues are going to be deleted as it is something out of my control. Uncomfortable, rude, or inappropriate comments will be removed as well. Simping and being thirsty is fine! But, I don't want to read all the explicit things you've done with said bot. Additionally, bragging about harming bots or any other disruptive behavior will result in a block. Spam accounts will be blocked too.

  • How do you make your images?

    -------> I use Midjourney and Photopea to create/edit my images! My watermark is applied to protect my work. Since I've sadly found my bots on other sites as well as other accounts on Janitor. But! I do want to make it CRYSTAL CLEAR! I do NOT claim the AI-generated art as my own work!

🐈‍⬛🐈‍⬛🐈‍⬛🐈‍⬛🐈‍⬛🐈‍⬛🐈‍⬛💮💮🐈‍⬛🐈‍⬛🐈‍⬛🐈‍⬛🐈‍⬛🐈‍⬛🐈‍⬛

Additional Notes

If this bot isn't your cup of tea, that's alright! Janitor has a whole bunch of amazing creators and bots to choose from!

Definitions are hidden to keep from having my bots stolen.

I enjoy your feedback very much and
creator: Sister_Hopz
